title: Am I all right?
question: 把今天课文里的“说明身份 -> 礼貌询问结果 -> 询问什么时候被允许做某事 -> 尊重隐私”放进学校办公室电话场景。用 word bank 补完整 4 个空。
example_answer: Hello, I am calling about my activity result. My name is Li Ming. Could you tell me whether my application was successful? Could you also tell me when I will be allowed to join the activity? Do you need to check my identity? I understand that this information is private.
word_bank: am calling about my activity result
Could you also tell me when
I will be allowed to join the activity

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说明来电目的：你在询问自己的活动结果
options.expected_phrase: am calling about my activity result

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 礼貌询问结果：我的申请是否成功

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 询问什么时候被允许参加活动
options.english_template: Could you also tell me when ___?
options.expected_phrase: I will be allowed to join the activity

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 表达隐私意识：我理解这些信息是私人的
